data.title: Adobe Q4 Earnings: Revenue, EPS Beat On Strong Demand Related To AI, Shares Slide Following Soft Guidance
data.description: Adobe reports fourth-quarter revenue of $5.61 billion, beating the consensus estimate of $5.54 billion. The company reports fourth-quarter adjusted earnings of $4.81 per share, beating analyst estimates of $4.66 per share.

data.title: $100 Invested In This Stock 15 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
Options Corner: Palantir Call Spreads Remain Compelling Despite Overvaluation Concerns
data.description: While experts may be split about Palantir's ability to move higher, options traders can shift the odds in their favor.
